rationale: Review 1's findings on includeRight_apply (exact rfl duplicate of Mathlib's @[simp] includeRight_apply), map_tmul/map_to* (direct specializations of Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map_* via the id case) and antipode_tmul (unnecessary indirection over _root_.TensorProduct.antipode_def) are accurate against the diff and material for reuse; acting on them removes unneeded local simp lemmas and tightens Mathlib reuse. Review 2's 'no duplicates' approval would leave those in, while its 'private helpers' stance is weaker than Review 1's (those are internal-only and correctly private here).
